name: Browser Queue
description: Manages browser access across all sessions with task-level locking queue

inactivityTimeoutMs.description: How long without browser activity before checking if session is still active (default: 300000 - 5 min)

inactivityCheckIntervalMs.description: How often to check for inactivity (default: 30000 - 30s)

mainSessionPriority.description: Whether main session gets priority in queue (default: true)

autoReleaseAfterMs.description: Auto-release after this many ms of no browser calls (default: 60000 - 60s)

enforcedProfile.description: Whether to enforce the default profile on all browser calls (default: true)

enforcedTarget.description: Whether to enforce the default target on all browser calls (default: true)

allowedProfiles.description: List of allowed browser profiles (empty = all allowed)

blockedProfiles.description: Profiles that are blocked unless explicitly overridden

blockedTargets.description: Targets that are blocked unless explicitly overridden
